title: Campaign Monitor vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Campaign Monitor and Flodesk. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool is best for your business.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Flodesk: Complete Comparison
intro: Campaign Monitor and Flodesk are both capable email marketing platforms, but they cater to different audiences and use cases. Campaign Monitor excels for agencies managing multiple client brands, while Flodesk prioritizes visual design and serves creative professionals. Understanding their key differences will help you choose the right tool for your business.

comparison_table.tool_b: Beautiful templates and flat unlimited pricing
Checkout forms and link in bio

choose_a_if: You manage multiple client brands and need white-label solutions
You want the lowest possible starting price and prefer scalable, contact-based pricing
You need advanced automation including transactional email capabilities
choose_b_if: You're a visual brand, designer, or photographer who prioritizes beautiful templates
You want unlimited subscribers on a predictable flat-rate monthly plan
You need built-in checkout forms and link-in-bio features for ecommerce

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Flodesk?
faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your needs. Campaign Monitor is superior for agencies managing multiple brands, offering more sophisticated segmentation and transactional capabilities. Flodesk wins for visual-focused brands that prioritize design and want unlimited subscribers at a flat rate. Check your specific requirements to determine which better suits your business.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Flodesk?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor starts at $11/month, making it cheaper upfront than Flodesk's $38/month. However, Campaign Monitor's pricing scales with contact count, so costs can increase significantly as your list grows. Flodesk's flat-rate pricing offers better value long-term if you have large subscriber lists, since you pay the same regardless of audience size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists and email history. Most email marketing tools support standard CSV exports, making migration straightforward. You'll need to recreate your email templates and workflows in Campaign Monitor, but your contact data transfers easily. Plan the migration during a low-activity period to minimize disruption.
